properties.displayName: Click Fraud and Automated Clicking Detection
properties.description: Detects automated clicking patterns and click fraud activities
properties.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where method == "GET" and (uri|contains has "click" or uri|contains has "ad" or uri|contains has "banner" or uri|contains has "impression" or uri|contains has "cpc" or uri|contains has "cpm" or uri|contains has "adsense" or uri|contains has "doubleclick") and (user_agent|contains has "bot" or user_agent|contains has "crawler" or user_agent|contains has "spider" or user_agent|contains has "automated" or user_agent|contains has "phantom" or user_agent|contains has "selenium" or user_agent|contains has "headless" or user_agent|contains has "chrome/99" or user_agent|contains has "firefox/99") and (referrer|contains has "google.com/search?q=click" or referrer|contains has "bing.com/search?q=click" or referrer|contains has "clickfarm" or referrer|contains has "autoclick" or referrer|contains has "botclick") and src_ip == "*"
